name: AI Research Trail Organizer
description: Turn user-provided AI chats, snippets, and links into a clean research trail with claims, evidence, questions, and next actions.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: Knowledge workers, students, analysts, writers, and builders who need to organize scattered AI-assisted research notes.
trigger_keywords: what evidence do I have for this
use_cases: Flagging unsupported claims and source gaps
Creating a next-action list for research follow-up
